goal_text: Task 12120: You are looking for a moderately priced restaurant and it should serve turkish food. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. Make sure you get the address and phone number.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
